title: Milkomatic
body:
Milkomatic is a Minecraft plugin that transforms dispensers into automated milking machines. It allows players to collect milk from cows, mooshrooms, goats, and even lightning-struck mobs effortlessly. Features include anti-duplication systems, configurable drops, and particle effects. Compatible with Minecraft 1.17–1.21.

![milking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sBXoKMaD/images/a92d5ed08d5e6bd33bb590ed8721a075a5869e03.gif)
